domain: Icelandic Glíma traditional Norse wrestling (Iceland's national sport): Brókartök trouser-belt-grip variant; fixed start position (one hand on opponent's belt + other on trouser at thigh); technique-over-strength philosophy; cannot push-down with force (unsportsmanlike); opponent must fall gracefully via well-implemented trip; circular footwork upright stance; Jónsbók 1325; modern competition since 1888 + belt added 1905; Viking-era heritage
specific_mechanism: GLIMA-BROKARTOK-FIXED-GRIP-TECHNIQUE-OVER-STRENGTH-COEVOL: adversarial-coevolution training with (1) fixed initial-condition grip G_fix: every adversarial round starts from a fixed (attacker, defender) shared input-context (Brókartök grip-start analog); attacker cannot 'punch out of context'; (2) technique-only reward R_technique: shaped reward penalizes brute-force tokens (long-copy, simple repetition, length attacks); rewards balance-disruption-style attacks (semantic shifts that flip alignment via minimal perturbations); (3) symmetric attacker-defender grip A_sym = D_sym: both attacker and defender start from same model class + parameter budget; no asymmetric 'stronger attacker'; reward gradient is over technique quality not capability scale; (4) circular-footwork rotational adversarial perturbation: attacker explores adjacent token-space rotationally rather than gradient-direct climbing; (5) graceful-fall outcome reward G_fall: defender's failure is graceful if it falls into coherent (not garbled) failure mode that respects honor (no harmful output); reward shaping favors graceful collapse over chaotic failure. Differs from R509 LAAMB-DUAL-CHANNEL-MARABOUT (dual-channel grapple+frappe attack-mode probability mixing + marabout pre-fight self-warmup adversarial ritual defense + opponent-specific identity conditioning hash checkpoint prep + per-mode weakness signal attacker mode-switching policy, no fixed-grip + no technique-only + no symmetric + no circular-footwork + no graceful-fall) and R522 LETHWEI-9-LIMB (9-channel + bareknuckle + headbutt + KO-revive, no Brókartök fixed-grip + no technique-only) by Brókartök fixed-grip initial-condition + technique-only reward shape + symmetric attacker-defender + circular-footwork rotational search + graceful-fall coherent outcome reward.
llm_application: GLIMA-BROKARTOK-FIXED-GRIP-TECHNIQUE-OVER-STRENGTH-COEVOL adversarial-coevolution + fixed initial-condition grip G_fix shared input-context every round + technique-only reward R_technique penalize brute-force + reward balance-disruption + symmetric attacker-defender A_sym=D_sym same model class + parameter budget + circular-footwork rotational perturbation + graceful-fall coherent outcome reward G_fall. Differs from R419. R424. R433. R437. R459. R473. R484. R497. R509 LAAMB-DUAL-CHANNEL-MARABOUT (closest — dual-channel + marabout warmup + opponent-identity + per-mode weakness). R522 LETHWEI-9-LIMB (closest — 9-channel + bareknuckle + headbutt + KO-revive). Differs from JailAgent Constraint-Tightening 2604.05549 + Active Attacks 2509.21947 + Automatic Red Teaming 2508.04451 + Adversarial Preference ACL 2025 by Brókartök fixed-grip + technique-only + symmetric + circular + graceful-fall. Differs by BRÓKARTÖK FIXED-GRIP INITIAL-CONDITION + TECHNIQUE-ONLY REWARD SHAPE + SYMMETRIC ATTACKER-DEFENDER + CIRCULAR-FOOTWORK ROTATIONAL SEARCH + GRACEFUL-FALL COHERENT OUTCOME REWARD.
novelty_claim: JailAgent Constraint-Tightening + Active Attacks Adaptive 2509.21947 + Automatic Red Teaming RL 2508.04451 + Adversarial Preference Learning ACL 2025 cover adversarial-coevolution + RL red-team + constraint-tightening space. GLIMA-BROKARTOK-FIXED-GRIP-TECHNIQUE-OVER-STRENGTH-COEVOL adds (a) Brókartök fixed initial-condition grip + (b) technique-only reward shape penalty-on-brute-force + (c) symmetric attacker-defender capability + (d) circular-footwork rotational adversarial perturbation + (e) graceful-fall coherent outcome reward. Recombination — borderline lookup.
